title: OSS 117 Murder for Sale
director: Renzo Cerrato, Jean-Pierre Desagnat, André Hunebelle
writer: Jean Bruce, Renzo Cerrato, Jean-Pierre Desagnat
actors: John Gavin, Margaret Lee, Curd Jürgens
plot: Agent OSS 117 infiltrates an organization that specializes in political assassinations, by assuming the identity of one of its top assassins.
